name: Randgold Resources
description: Randgold Resources was a prominent gold mining and exploration company primarily focused on operations in West and Central Africa, with significant assets in Mali, Côte d'Ivoire, and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Headquartered in Jersey, the company was known for its disciplined approach to mining and its commitment to sustainable development. Randgold Resources was listed on both the London Stock Exchange and the NASDAQ until it successfully merged with Barrick Gold Corporation in December 2018, creating one of the world's largest gold mining companies.
